name: jsc-flip-market
description: A web-application to manage property owners and flippers.

scripts.install:all: yarn --cwd backend install && yarn --cwd frontend install
scripts.lint: yarn --cwd backend lint && yarn --cwd frontend lint
scripts.typecheck: yarn --cwd backend typecheck && yarn --cwd frontend typecheck
scripts.test: yarn --cwd backend test && yarn --cwd frontend test
scripts.build: yarn --cwd backend build && yarn --cwd frontend build
